shortDescription:
HUMAN INDIVIDUAL DETECTED IN SCENE
IDENTIFIED BY BODY SHAPE AND MOVEMENT
NO THREAT ASSESSMENT — CONTEXT REQUIRED
commonUses: SOCIAL INTERACTION, SCENE AWARENESS, CROWD MONITORING

shortDescription:
TWO-WHEELED HUMAN-POWERED VEHICLE
CAN APPEAR SUDDENLY IN TRAFFIC
MODERATE COLLISION RISK AT INTERSECTIONS

MOTOR VEHICLE WITH FOUR WHEELS
USED FOR TRANSPORTATION ON ROADS
HAZARD: MOVING VEHICLE — STAY ALERT

TWO-WHEELED MOTOR VEHICLE — FAST AND AGILE
OFTEN HARD TO SEE IN BLIND SPOTS
HIGH COLLISION RISK — GIVE WIDE BERTH

FIXED-WING AIRCRAFT — EXTREMELY LARGE AND FAST
DANGEROUS PROPELLER AND JET BLAST ZONES
STAY CLEAR OF RUNWAYS AND TAXIWAYS
commonUses: AIR TRAVEL, CARGO TRANSPORT, MILITARY OPERATIONS

shortDescription:
LARGE PASSENGER VEHICLE — LIMITED VISIBILITY
WIDE TURNS AND FREQUENT STOPS
STAY CLEAR OF DOOR ZONES AND REAR BLIND SPOTS
commonUses: PUBLIC TRANSIT, SCHOOL TRANSPORT, CHARTER SERVICE

shortDescription:
RAILED VEHICLE — CANNOT STOP QUICKLY
EXTREMELY DANGEROUS AT CROSSINGS
NEVER TRESPASS ON TRACKS OR RAIL YARDS

LARGE CARGO VEHICLE — MASSIVE BLIND SPOTS
WIDE TURNS AND LONG STOPPING DISTANCE
DANGER: STAY VISIBLE AND KEEP DISTANCE

WATERCRAFT FOR RIVER, LAKE, OR OCEAN TRAVEL
SLIPPERY DECKS AND DROWNING HAZARD
LIFE JACKETS REQUIRED NEAR WATERCRAFT

SIGNALIZED INTERSECTION CONTROL DEVICE
OBSERVE SIGNAL STATE FOR SAFE CROSSING
RED LIGHT VIOLATIONS ARE A MAJOR HAZARD
commonUses: TRAFFIC MANAGEMENT, INTERSECTION CONTROL, PEDESTRIAN SAFETY

shortDescription:
EMERGENCY WATER ACCESS POINT FOR FIREFIGHTING
NEVER BLOCK OR PARK IN FRONT OF HYDRANT
PENALTY FOR OBSTRUCTING EMERGENCY ACCESS
commonUses: FIRE SUPPRESSION, EMERGENCY WATER SUPPLY, STREET MARKER

shortDescription:
MANDATORY STOP TRAFFIC CONTROL AT INTERSECTIONS
VEHICLES MUST COME TO FULL STOP
FAILURE TO STOP IS A SERIOUS VIOLATION
commonUses: TRAFFIC CONTROL, INTERSECTION SAFETY, RIGHT-OF-WAY MANAGEMENT

shortDescription:
STREET-SIDE PAYMENT DEVICE FOR PARKED VEHICLES
INDICATES REGULATED PARKING ZONE
EXPIRED METERS MAY RESULT IN FINES
commonUses: PARKING REGULATION, REVENUE COLLECTION, TIME LIMIT ENFORCEMENT

shortDescription:
OUTDOOR SEATING FOR REST AND RECREATION
LOW OBSTACLE — MAY CAUSE TRIP IF UNSEEN
COMMON IN PARKS, BUS STOPS, AND WALKWAYS
commonUses: REST AREA, PUBLIC SEATING, BUS STOP, PARK FURNITURE

shortDescription:
AVIAN CREATURE — FLIGHT CAPABLE
GENERALLY HARMLESS TO HUMANS
MAY INDICATE OUTDOOR OR NATURAL ENVIRONMENT
commonUses: WILDLIFE OBSERVATION, ECOSYSTEM INDICATOR, PEST CONTROL

shortDescription:
DOMESTIC FELINE — AGILE AND INDEPENDENT
GENERALLY HARMLESS BUT MAY SCRATCH IF PROVOKED
COMMON HOUSEHOLD PET AND URBAN STRAY

DOMESTIC CANINE — VARIES WILDLY IN SIZE AND TEMPER
SOME BREEDS CAN BE AGGRESSIVE OR PROTECTIVE
ALWAYS ASK OWNER BEFORE APPROACHING
commonUses: COMPANIONSHIP, GUARD DUTY, SERVICE WORK, HUNTING

shortDescription:
LARGE DOMESTICATED UNGULATE — POWERFUL KICK
CAN BE UNPREDICTABLE IF STARTLED
STAY BEHIND THE ANIMAL AND MOVE CALMLY
commonUses: RIDING, AGRICULTURE, THERAPY, COMPETITION, POLICE WORK

shortDescription:
DOMESTIC GRAZING ANIMAL — FLOCK BEHAVIOR
DOCILE BUT MAY CHARGE WHEN THREATENED
COMMON IN RURAL AND AGRICULTURAL SETTINGS

LARGE DOMESTIC BOVINE — EXTREMELY HEAVY
CAN KICK OR CHARGE IF FEELING THREATENED
GIVE LIVESTOCK WIDE BERTH IN FIELDS

MASSIVE PACHYDERM — LARGEST LAND ANIMAL
CAPABLE OF CHARGING AT HIGH SPEED
EXTREMELY DANGEROUS IF AGITATED — KEEP DISTANCE

POWERFUL PREDATOR — EXTREMELY DANGEROUS
CAN RUN FASTER THAN HUMANS AND CLIMB TREES
BACK AWAY SLOWLY — NEVER RUN FROM A BEAR
commonUses: WILDLIFE OBSERVATION, NONE — DO NOT APPROACH

shortDescription:
STRIPED EQUINE OF THE AFRICAN PLAINS
WILD AND UNPREDICTABLE — CANNOT BE DOMESTICATED
KICKS ARE POWERFUL ENOUGH TO KILL
commonUses: WILDLIFE OBSERVATION, SAFARI TOURISM, ECOSYSTEM INDICATOR

shortDescription:
TALLEST LIVING ANIMAL — LONG NECK AND LEGS
KICKS FROM FRONT HOOVES CAN BE LETHAL
GENERALLY DOCILE — OBSERVE FROM A DISTANCE
commonUses: WILDLIFE OBSERVATION, SAFARI TOURISM, ZOO EXHIBIT

shortDescription:
PORTABLE BAG WORN ON THE BACK
MAY CONTAIN VALUABLES OR UNKNOWN ITEMS
LOW OBSTACLE — WATCH FOR TRIPPING IN CROWDS

FOLDABLE CANOPY FOR RAIN OR SUN PROTECTION
METAL RIBS CAN POKE NEARBY PEDESTRIANS
MAY REDUCE VISIBILITY FOR THE CARRIER
commonUses: RAIN PROTECTION, SUN SHADE, BEACH SHELTER

shortDescription:
SMALL PERSONAL CARRYING BAG FOR DAILY ITEMS
OFTEN LEFT ON SEATS OR FLOORS — TRIP HAZARD
MAY CONTAIN VALUABLES — PICKPOCKET RISK
commonUses: PERSONAL STORAGE, FASHION ACCESSORY, DAILY ESSENTIALS

shortDescription:
NECKWEAR WORN WITH FORMAL ATTIRE
ENTANGLEMENT HAZARD NEAR MACHINERY
COMMON IN PROFESSIONAL AND FORMAL SETTINGS

RIGID TRAVEL BAG ON WHEELS — BULKY OBJECT
ROLLING SUITCASES CAN TRIP PEDESTRIANS
UNATTENDED BAGS MAY INDICATE SECURITY RISK

FLYING DISC FOR RECREATIONAL THROWING
LIGHTWEIGHT AND HARMLESS IN FLIGHT
INDICATES OUTDOOR RECREATIONAL ACTIVITY
commonUses: RECREATION, DOG TOYS, ULTIMATE FRISBEE SPORT

shortDescription:
LONG NARROW RUNNERS FOR SNOW TRAVEL
SHARP EDGES CAN CAUSE LACERATIONS
INDICATES WINTER SPORT ENVIRONMENT
commonUses: DOWNHILL SKIING, CROSS-COUNTRY SKIING, WINTER SPORTS

shortDescription:
SINGLE-BOARD SNOW SLIDING DEVICE
FAST DESCENT SPEED ON SNOWY SLOPES
INDICATES WINTER SPORT AND MOUNTAIN ENVIRONMENT

SPHERICAL EQUIPMENT USED IN VARIOUS SPORTS
MAY BE THROWN OR KICKED AT HIGH SPEED
INDICATES ACTIVE SPORTING AREA — STAY ALERT

TETHERED FLYING OBJECT RIDDEN BY WIND

INDICATES OUTDOOR RECREATIONAL ACTIVITY
commonUses: RECREATION, KITE FLYING, KITE SURFING, FESTIVALS

shortDescription:
SOLID CLUB USED IN BASEBALL — HEAVY IMPACT
CAN CAUSE SERIOUS BLUNT FORCE INJURY
POTENTIALLY DANGEROUS IF WIELDED AS A WEAPON

LEATHER MITT FOR CATCHING BASEBALLS
PADDED PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR ONE HAND
INDICATES BASEBALL OR SOFTBALL ACTIVITY NEARBY
commonUses: BASEBALL, SOFTBALL, CATCHING PRACTICE, SPORT EQUIPMENT

shortDescription:
WHEELED BOARD FOR ROLLING AND TRICKS

PEDESTRIAN COLLISION RISK IN SHARED SPACES

BUOYANT BOARD FOR RIDING OCEAN WAVES
LONG AND HEAVY — CAN INJURE IF STRUCK
INDICATES BEACH AND OCEAN ENVIRONMENT

STRINGED FRAME FOR STRIKING TENNIS BALLS

INDICATES TENNIS COURT OR SPORTING AREA

CYLINDRICAL CONTAINER FOR LIQUIDS
GLASS BOTTLES CAN SHATTER — CUT HAZARD
SPILLED CONTENTS MAY CREATE SLIP HAZARD

STEMMED GLASS FOR SERVING WINE
FRAGILE — EASILY SHATTERED INTO SHARP SHARDS
BROKEN GLASS IS A SERIOUS LACERATION HAZARD
commonUses: DINING, WINE SERVICE, FORMAL EVENTS, DECORATION

shortDescription:
OPEN-TOPPED DRINKING VESSEL
HOT CONTENTS MAY CAUSE BURNS IF SPILLED
COMMON ON DESKS AND TABLES — KNOCKOVER RISK

PRONGED UTENSIL FOR EATING AND SERVING
SHARP TINES CAN PUNCTURE SKIN
KEEP AWAY FROM CHILDREN AND STORE SAFELY

SHARP BLADED CUTTING TOOL — EXTREME CAUTION
CAN CAUSE SEVERE LACERATIONS INSTANTLY
HANDLE WITH CARE — KEEP AWAY FROM CHILDREN

BOWL-SHAPED UTENSIL FOR EATING AND STIRRING
SAFE FOR ALL AGES — MINIMAL RISK
ESSENTIAL KITCHEN AND DINING TOOL

ROUND OPEN CONTAINER FOR FOOD AND LIQUIDS
STABLE AND GENERALLY HARMLESS
COMMON IN KITCHEN AND DINING SETTINGS
commonUses: SERVING FOOD, SOUP, CEREAL, MIXING INGREDIENTS

shortDescription:
CURVED YELLOW TROPICAL FRUIT — SWEET AND NUTRITIOUS
PEEL IS A CLASSIC SLIP HAZARD ON FLOORS
RICH IN POTASSIUM AND QUICK ENERGY

ROUND CRISP FRUIT — RED, GREEN, OR YELLOW
NUTRITIOUS AND WIDELY AVAILABLE
CHOKING HAZARD IF NOT CHEWED PROPERLY

FILLING BETWEEN TWO SLICES OF BREAD
PORTABLE MEAL — CONVENIENT AND VERSATILE
COMMON LUNCH AND PICNIC FOOD ITEM

ROUND CITRUS FRUIT — JUICY AND TANGY
RICH IN VITAMIN C — IMMUNE BOOSTER
PEEL OIL CAN IRRITATE EYES AND SKIN
commonUses: SNACK, JUICE, COOKING, VITAMIN C SOURCE

shortDescription:
GREEN CRUCIFEROUS VEGETABLE — NUTRIENT DENSE
HIGH IN VITAMINS K AND C
SUPERFOOD — OFTEN SERVED STEAMED OR RAW

ORANGE ROOT VEGETABLE — CRUNCHY AND SWEET
HIGH IN BETA-CAROTENE AND VITAMIN A
CHOKING HAZARD FOR SMALL CHILDREN IF WHOLE

COOKED SAUSAGE IN A BUN — CLASSIC STREET FOOD
TOP CHOKING HAZARD FOR YOUNG CHILDREN
SERVE SLICED LENGTHWISE FOR KIDS UNDER 4
commonUses: MEAL, STREET FOOD, BARBECUE, STADIUM FOOD

shortDescription:
FLATBREAD WITH CHEESE AND TOPPINGS
EXTREMELY HOT CHEESE CAN CAUSE MOUTH BURNS
UNIVERSALLY POPULAR COMFORT FOOD

SWEET FRIED RING-SHAPED PASTRY
HIGH IN SUGAR AND CALORIES
POPULAR BREAKFAST AND DESSERT TREAT

SWEET BAKED DESSERT — OFTEN DECORATED
CANDLES PRESENT BURN HAZARD ON BIRTHDAY CAKES
CELEBRATION AND DESSERT STAPLE

SEAT WITH BACK SUPPORT — COMMON FURNITURE
TRIP HAZARD IF LEFT IN WALKWAYS
DAMAGED CHAIRS MAY COLLAPSE UNDER WEIGHT

LARGE UPHOLSTERED SEATING FOR MULTIPLE PEOPLE
HEAVY — DIFFICULT TO MOVE SAFELY
TRIP HAZARD AROUND LOW PROFILE DESIGNS
commonUses: LOUNGING, SEATING, LIVING ROOM, SOCIAL GATHERING

shortDescription:
PLANT GROWING IN A CONTAINER — DECORATIVE
SOIL MAY CONTAIN MOLD OR ALLERGENS
HEAVY POTS CAN FALL — KEEP STABLE SURFACES

FURNITURE FOR SLEEPING AND RESTING
LOW PROFILE — TRIP HAZARD IN DARK ROOMS
FRAME CORNERS CAN CAUSE BRUISES ON IMPACT

FLAT SURFACE FOR EATING AND GATHERING
LARGE FOOTPRINT — OBSTACLE IN TIGHT SPACES
SHARP EDGES ON CORNERS MAY CAUSE INJURY
commonUses: DINING, WORK SURFACE, GATHERING, BOARD GAMES

shortDescription:
SANITARY FIXTURE FOR WASTE DISPOSAL
SLIPPERY FLOOR COMMONLY FOUND NEARBY
ESSENTIAL BATHROOM FIXTURE — HYGIENE CRITICAL

TELEVISION DISPLAY SCREEN — ENTERTAINMENT DEVICE
HEAVY — TIP-OVER HAZARD IF NOT SECURED
MOUNT SECURELY TO PREVENT CRUSHING INJURY

PORTABLE PERSONAL COMPUTER — THIN AND LIGHT
BATTERY CAN OVERHEAT WITH POOR VENTILATION
SCREEN HINGES MAY PINCH FINGERS

HAND-HELD POINTING DEVICE FOR COMPUTERS
REPETITIVE USE CAN CAUSE WRIST STRAIN
ESSENTIAL COMPUTER INPUT PERIPHERAL

HAND-HELD WIRELESS CONTROLLER FOR DEVICES
SMALL PARTS — CHOKING HAZARD FOR CHILDREN
OFTEN LOST BETWEEN COUCH CUSHIONS
commonUses: TV CONTROL, DEVICE OPERATION, SMART HOME, ENTERTAINMENT

shortDescription:
TEXT INPUT DEVICE FOR COMPUTERS AND TERMINALS
REPETITIVE TYPING CAN CAUSE CARPAL TUNNEL
ESSENTIAL TOOL FOR WORK AND COMMUNICATION
commonUses: COMPUTING, TYPING, GAMING, PROGRAMMING, DATA ENTRY

shortDescription:
MOBILE COMMUNICATION AND COMPUTING DEVICE
DISTRACTED WALKING IS A MAJOR SAFETY RISK
BATTERY FIRE RISK IF DAMAGED OR COUNTERFEIT

ELECTRIC OVEN USING MICROWAVE RADIATION
METAL OBJECTS CAUSE DANGEROUS SPARKS INSIDE
SUPERHEATED LIQUIDS CAN ERUPT VIOLENTLY
commonUses: FOOD HEATING, COOKING, DEFROSTING, MEAL PREP

shortDescription:
ENCLOSED HEATING APPLIANCE FOR COOKING
EXTERIOR SURFACES REACH DANGEROUS TEMPERATURES
BURN RISK — KEEP CHILDREN AWAY WHEN IN USE

ELECTRIC APPLIANCE FOR BROWNING BREAD
HEATING ELEMENTS REACH EXTREME TEMPERATURES
NEVER INSERT UTENSILS — SHOCK AND BURN RISK

BASIN FIXTURE FOR WASHING AND DRAINING
HOT WATER CAN CAUSE SCALD BURNS
SLIPPERY SURFACE WHEN WET — STABLE FOOTING NEEDED

INSULATED COOLING APPLIANCE FOR FOOD STORAGE
HEAVY — TIP-OVER RISK IF NOT LEVELED
CHILDREN MAY BECOME TRAPPED INSIDE DISCARDED UNITS
commonUses: FOOD PRESERVATION, COLD STORAGE, BEVERAGE COOLING

shortDescription:
BOUND PAGES OF WRITTEN OR PRINTED CONTENT
HEAVY STACKS CAN FALL FROM HIGH SHELVES
PAPER CUTS ARE MINOR BUT PAINFUL

TIMEKEEPING DEVICE — ANALOG OR DIGITAL
WALL CLOCKS MAY FALL IF NOT PROPERLY MOUNTED
ESSENTIAL FOR SCHEDULING AND TIME MANAGEMENT

DECORATIVE CONTAINER FOR FLOWERS AND PLANTS
FRAGILE — GLASS OR CERAMIC SHATTER HAZARD
BROKEN PIECES ARE EXTREMELY SHARP
commonUses: FLOWER DISPLAY, DECORATION, HOME ACCENT, GIFTS

shortDescription:
SHARP BLADED CUTTING TOOL — DUAL BLADES
CAN CAUSE SERIOUS LACERATIONS AND PUNCTURES
ALWAYS CUT AWAY FROM BODY — KEEP FROM CHILDREN
commonUses: CUTTING PAPER, CRAFTS, SEWING, FIRST AID

shortDescription:
SOFT PLUSH TOY IN THE SHAPE OF A BEAR
COMFORT OBJECT FOR CHILDREN AND COLLECTORS
SMALL PARTS (EYES, NOSE) ARE CHOKING HAZARDS

ELECTRIC DEVICE FOR BLOWING HOT AIR ON HAIR
HEATING ELEMENTS CAN CAUSE BURNS
DO NOT USE NEAR WATER — ELECTROCUTION RISK
commonUses: HAIR STYLING, DRYING, PET GROOMING, CRAFTS

shortDescription:
BRISTLED CLEANING TOOL FOR ORAL HYGIENE
ELECTRIC MODELS HAVE SMALL CHOKING PARTS
ESSENTIAL DAILY PERSONAL CARE ITEM
commonUses: TEETH CLEANING, ORAL HYGIENE, DENTAL CARE
